entry.title: Several Examples of the Application on Optimal Control
entry.content:
I have taken the course MA 661 Dyn. Prog. & Rein. Lern in 2020 spring. Only theoretical study may not be straightforward to understand all the concepts. I have modified the homework solution and posted to the github. For the sake of convenience, I put the hyperlink in my blog making further search more easily.

  • Assignment 01 Finite Horizon Deterministic System
  • Assignment 02 Finite Horizon Stochastic System
  • Assignment 03 Equipment Replacement Problem
